raw: We need a Senior Frontend Engineer to lead our consumer app web experience. Strong React and TypeScript are required; you will architect reusable component libraries, mentor junior engineers, and drive front-end performance improvements.
Seeking a Data Scientist to join our analytics team. You will build predictive models, run A/B experiments, and develop SQL dashboards. Python and SQL are must-haves.
Staff-level DevOps engineer with deep Kubernetes expertise. We are a small team and you will own all infrastructure. Terraform and cloud platform experience required.
